events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a duct installation that is rough-complete, with sagging flex duct exceeding ½ inch per foot between supports. This is a code/workmanship defect. IMC 603 and SMACNA require proper support of flex duct, typically maximum support spacing and no sagging beyond limits. Sagging flex >½ in/ft is non-compliant and defective.

Decision: fail (non-compliant defect)
Risk: medium (airflow issues, potential damage, but not immediately dangerous)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: 70
Value: 0 (no numeric reading asked)
Confidence: high, say 0.9
Findings: sagging flex duct exceeds ½ in/ft between supports
Actions: re-support flex duct at proper intervals per SMACNA/IMC 603, correct sag
References: IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D
